prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: MET-WETSUITSHAMPOO-AMZN-HPN Product Type: CLEANING_AGENT Brand (from catalog): GEAR AID Existing Title: GEAR AID Revivex Wetsuit and Drysuit Shampoo, Cleaner and Conditioner, 10 fl oz Description: Refresh and maintain neoprene gear with Revivex Wetsuit and Drysuit Shampoo. Expensive suits are prone to chlorine and salt damage after years of use. This shampoo cleans and conditions suits by removing residues.

The result is neoprene gear that smells fresh, stays supple and lasts much longer. It’s also safe to use on booties, gloves, fishing waders and GORE-TEX fabric. With Revivex Wetsuit and Drysuit Shampoo it has never been easier to extend the life of costly suits. Search Terms: sealant gear spray outgo scuba repair Features: - Clean and condition expensive wetsuits, drysuits and other neoprene gear - Extend suit life by keeping neoprene supple and fresh while keeping colors bright; prevents premature aging and oxidation - Use this gentle wash on booties, gloves, fishing waders, GORE-TEX® fabrics and Lycra® body wear; available in 10 fl oz pouch - Remove organic residue from all types of watersports gear with a concentrated formula that’s good for up to 10 washes - Packaging may vary === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: GEAR AID Revivex Wetsuit and Drysuit Shampoo 10 fl oz

openai.item_name: GEAR AID 10-fl oz Revivex Wetsuit and Drysuit Shampoo

anthropic.title_differentiation: Cleaner And Conditioner, Removes Chlorine And Salt Damage, Extends Suit Life, Safe For Booties Gloves And GORE-TEX, Concentrated Formula

openai.title_differentiation: Cleans And Conditions Neoprene, Removes Chlorine And Salt Residue, Safe For Wetsuits, Drysuits, Gloves, Waders
